no_temp_file_refs.name: No temporary file references in health log
no_temp_file_refs.message: Health log contains temporary photo refs (file_XXX---uuid.jpg). These must be replaced with real iili.io URLs before commit.

all_photos_must_have_urls.name: All food entries with photos must link to real URLs
all_photos_must_have_urls.checks: If entry has [📷], the URL must be https://iili.io/ or https://files.catbox.moe/

no_missing_photo_links.name: Photo references must exist
no_missing_photo_links.checks: All [📷](url) URLs must be accessible (return 200 OK)
